Notes: 2004 NJAC Semifinal...TCNJ will advance to the NJAC Championship and will face
William Paterson in Packer Hall at 7. Liz Martin led the Lions with a double-
double on 18 points and 12 boards. Kellie Rice paced Kean with a game-high 25.
Game.Officials: Maryanne Crowe,  Ron DePasquale,  Maureen McCann
